name: Changed skills keep review metadata
instruction: Changes to committed skill definitions must keep corresponding Tessl review metadata under `catalog/reviews/`.
relevant_when: Diff that adds, removes, renames, or changes files matching `skills/*/SKILL.md` or files under `catalog/reviews/`.
context: The Context Specs catalog treats review records as durable evidence that each skill remains reviewed and meets the minimum quality bar.
scope_reason: The invariant depends on the relationship between changed skill files and their companion review-record files.

checklist.name: changed-skill-has-review-record
checklist.rule: For every changed `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`, the diff includes or preserves a matching `catalog/reviews/skills__<name>.json` review record unless the skill is deleted.

checklist.name: new-skill-review-record-looks-current
checklist.rule: When a skill is added or substantially changed, the matching review record is present in the committed catalog review directory rather than only in `.tessl/review-results/`.
